chapter_title.en: Chapter on the wife's Rights Over Her Husband

text: 4526 - وَ سَأَلَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ حَقِّ اَلْمَرْأَةِ عَلَى زَوْجِهَا قَالَ "يُشْبِعُ بَطْنَهَا وَ يَكْسُو جُثَّتَهَا وَ إِنْ جَهِلَتْ غَفَرَ لَهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4526 - Ishaq ibn Ammar asked Abu Abdillah (as) about the right of a woman over her husband.
Imam (as) said: "He should satisfy her hunger, clothe her body, and if she acts ignorantly, he should forgive her."
